name: runalert
description: Track Minecraft speedruns and alert viewers when a run becomes worth watching.
author: Jerry Zhan

scripts.workspace:run: concurrently -k -n api,ui "PORT=$CONDUCTOR_PORT npm run start:web" "VITE_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:$CONDUCTOR_PORT VITE_TWITCH_STATUS_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:$CONDUCTOR_PORT npm --prefix dashboard run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port $((CONDUCTOR_PORT + 1))"
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n dashboard,electron "VITE_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:18787 npm --prefix dashboard run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache electron_config_cache=.electron-cache RUNALERT_ELECTRON_DEV=1 RUNALERT_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run dashboard:build && ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache electron_config_cache=.electron-cache ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.electron-builder-cache electron-builder --dir
scripts.electron:pack:mac: npm run dashboard:build && RUNALERT_REQUIRE_NOTARIZATION=1 ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache electron_config_cache=.electron-cache ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.electron-builder-cache electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal --publish never
scripts.electron:pack:win: npm run dashboard:build && ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache electron_config_cache=.electron-cache ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.electron-builder-cache electron-builder --win appx --x64 --publish never
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:dashboard && npm run lint && npm run dashboard:build && npm run test:layout
scripts.test:all:with-visual: npm run test:all && npm run test:visual
